title: Xiaomi 17 Ultra with Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 SoC, 6,330 mAh battery launched globally: Price, specs and more
summary: Xiaomi has unveiled the Xiaomi 17 Ultra in Barcelona, featuring a Leica triple camera, Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5, and a 6.9-inch OLED display. Prices start at 1,499 Euros for the base model, with IP68 rating and a 6,000mAh battery.

title: Xiaomi 17 with triple 50MP Leica cameras, 6,330mAh battery launched in India: Price, specs and more
summary: Xiaomi launched the flagship Xiaomi 17 in Barcelona, competing with Oppo Find X9 and OnePlus 15. It offers four colors, starts at 999 Euros, features a 6.3-inch OLED display, Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 processor, Leica triple camera setup, and a 6,330mAh battery with fast charging.

title: Xiaomi 17, Xiaomi 17 Ultra, Pad 8 global launch today: LIVE-STREAM details, expected specs, features and more
summary: Xiaomi is launching its flagship Xiaomi 17 series and Pad 8 tablet today. The live-stream starts at 2PM Barcelona time. The Xiaomi 17 features a 6.3-inch OLED display, Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 processor, Leica triple camera, and a 7,000mAh battery with fast charging.

title: AI cannot replace core functions in legal profession, trained mind will prevail: Justice Viswanathan
summary: Justice Viswanathan said there had been instances in the court when lawyers relied on AI-generated citations that have turned out to be fictitious. He advised that artificial intelligence should be used like any other professional tool - with skill, caution, and with one's own mind firmly in charge.
